query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companies) as total_companies, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != '') as contacts_with_email;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UxY7cuXnvuRi8f.8c1609f0f8aa --database b3TbS2DyQf7qnZv6huYWZm --execute SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companies) as total_companies, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != '') as contacts_with_email;
